entries.title: 3-tier verification badges
entries.description: full_pipeline (green shield), scanner_only (blue scanner), metadata_only (gray info). CSS classes: .badge-verified, .badge-scanned, .badge-metadata.

entries.title: Status toggle filters
entries.description: Frontend filters by verification status. Toggle buttons for pass/fail/manual_review/unverified.

entries.title: Dual catalog display: MCP vs Agent skill types
entries.description: Collection is 11,098 skills across two types: mcp_server (6,297, have stars) and agent_skill (4,801, have installs). Frontend should display catalog type context. Agent skills show installs as the primary metric (not stars — stars will be 0 or absent). MCP skills show stars. The skill.skill_type field drives which metric to surface. Future: separate catalog tabs or filter by skill_type.

entries.title: installs field: agent skill primary metric
entries.description: Agent skills from skillsmp have skill.installs (integer, extracted from tags as of 2026-03-04). Stars will be 0 for agent skills. When rendering skill cards or detail views for agent_skill type, display skill.installs instead of skill.stars. Top agent skills: extract-errors (243K), 1password (206K), accessibility (181K). MCP skills: use skill.stars as usual.
